data.name: 金絲雀的幸福理論：夜總會經營與戀愛
data.detailed_description:
走進瀕臨倒閉、霓虹燈閃爍的夜店世界。

作為新任老闆，你的任務明確：重振夜店，取悅顧客，最大化利潤。升級設施，管理員工，讓每一個夜晚都不浪費——因為一次錯誤的決策可能讓你破產。

但夜店真正的魅力，遠不止帳本。吧台背後、舞台上，以及城市夜生活的精英中，六位令人難忘的角色正等待著你。從自豪的繼承人到純真的少女，從已婚女性到誘人的魅魔，甚至還有迷人的偽娘，每個人都隱藏著秘密、欲望與野心。戀愛、誘惑與背叛（NTR）潛伏在每一次邂逅中，考驗你的忠誠與關係。

規劃你的白天，策略你的夜晚，做出能贏得心——或摧毀心——的選擇。每一次互動都會塑造夜店及其人物的未來。

《金絲雀的幸福理論：夜店經營與戀愛》特色：

  • 夜店經營 – 升級、分配並管理員工，保持業務繁榮。

  • 角色驅動的戀愛 – 與六位個性鮮明的角色探索愛情、欲望與情感張力。

  • 成人劇情 – 在霓虹燈下的深夜世界體驗誘惑、背叛與複雜關係。

你能掌控生意——還是陷入其誘惑混亂之中？

**成人內容警告：**包含性內容、戀愛和關係背叛（NTR）。僅限成年人。

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows (Windows 7 / 8 / 10 / 11)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 or equivalent
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Integrated graphics capable of running DirectX 10
  • DirectX: 版本：10
  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Standard sound card
  • VR 支援: Not required
  • 備註: Non-VR game, low-end PC compatible

  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: windows10
  • 處理器:

data.name: Canary’s Theory of Happiness: Nightclub Management & Romance
data.detailed_description:
Step into the neon-soaked world of a struggling nightclub on the brink of collapse.

As the new owner, your mission is clear: revive the club, satisfy your patrons, and maximize profits. Upgrade facilities, manage staff, and make every night count—because one wrong decision could send your business spiraling into bankruptcy.

But the club’s true intrigue lies beyond the ledger. Behind the bar, on the stage, and among the city’s nightlife elite, six unforgettable characters await. From a proud heiress to an innocent girl, from a married woman to a seductive succubus, and even a charming femboy, each one hides secrets, desires, and ambitions. Romance, temptation, and betrayal (NTR) lurk in every encounter, challenging your loyalties and testing your relationships.

Plan your days, strategize your nights, and make choices that could win hearts—or shatter them. Every interaction shapes the future of the club and the people within it.

Canary’s Theory of Happiness: Nightclub Management & Romance combines:

  • Nightclub Management – Upgrade, assign, and lead your staff to keep the business thriving.

  • Character-Driven Romance – Explore love, desire, and emotional tension with six distinct characters.

  • Adult-Themed Drama – Experience temptation, betrayal, and complex relationships in a late-night, neon-lit world.

Will you master the business—or become entangled in its seductive chaos?

Adult Content Warning: Contains sexual content, romance, and relationship betrayal (NTR). For adults only.
